---
title: "Licensing Models"
---

:::{.hero-section style="padding-top: 3rem; padding-bottom: 2rem;"}
:::{.lead}
First Synthesis LLC employs a dual-licensing structure for the Monist Engine. This ensures open access for fundamental mathematical research while providing robust commercial protections and integrations for enterprise AI alignment and formal verification firms.
:::
:::

::::{.feature-grid}

:::{.feature-card}
### Open Source License

**Type:** AGPLv3 (Placeholder)

Committed to open mathematical research. The Monist Engine's core components are available for academic researchers and individuals building non-commercial tools. Any derived work must also be open-sourced under identical terms.
:::
  
:::{.feature-card}
### Commercial License

**Type:** First Synth Enterprise Proprietary

Designed for enterprises integrating First Synth technology into proprietary products, closed-source AI architectures, and commercial verifiers. Removes all copyleft restrictions and includes dedicated NPU/GPU architecture consultations.
:::

::::

:::{style="margin-top: 4rem;"}
<a href="about.qmd" class="btn-primary">Inquire About Enterprise Licensing</a>
:::
